'''''Classic Star Wars''''' was an expansive [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series published by [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] that re-released several ''Star Wars'' comics of the [[original trilogy]] era, including the daily [[Star Wars (comic strip)|''Star Wars'' strip]] by [[Archie Goodwin]] and [[Al Williamson]], as well as several from [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] series of the '70s and '80s. The entire series was published from [[1992]] to [[2003]].

The original strips were edited and retouched, while some continuity repetitions were removed in order to form a seamless narrative. Minimalist coloring was added to the black and white drawings by Russ Manning, as the traditional four-color comic book feel fit better with his classic artwork.<ref name="gathering">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', Part 5: Shadow Play, I. GATHERING OF THE TRIBES</ref>
